embeds.title: AutoMint Desktop
embeds.description:
A native desktop app for [automint.online](https://automint.online) - Discord-style, no browser chrome, just the site in a clean window.

**[Download Latest Release](https://github.com/PowerhouseMYSTK/wispr-wrapper/releases/latest)**

fields.name: Features
fields.value:
- Native frameless window
- Persistent login session
- Settings panel (notifications, reload, clear session)
- Auto-updater - updates silently in the background
- Minimizes to system tray

fields.name: Installation
fields.value: Download the .exe from the link above and run it.
